target.sql_fulltext: select SUM(P__460),SUM(P__945),SUM(P__52),SUM(P__359),SUM(P__929),SUM(P__35),SUM(P__268),SUM(P__726),SUM(P__917),SUM(P__743),SUM(P__51),AVG(P__931),inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18, inner_select.par19, inner_select.par20, inner_select.par21, inner_select.par22, inner_select.par23, inner_select.par24, inner_select.par25, inner_select.par26, inner_select.par27, inner_select.par28, inner_select.par29, inner_select.par30 from (select SUM(a.PMERABRELABNORMALENBACT) P__460,SUM(a.PMRRCCONNLEVSUM) P__945,SUM(a.PMS1SIGCONNESTABSUCC) P__52,SUM(a.PMCELLHOEXESUCCLTEINTRAF) P__359,SUM(a.PMACTIVEUEDLSUM) P__929,SUM(a.PMERABESTABATTADDED) P__35,SUM(a.PMCELLHOEXESUCCLTEINTERF) P__268,SUM(a.PMPDCPVOLULDRB) P__726,SUM(a.PMUETHPVOLUL) P__917,SUM(a.PMSCHEDACTIVITYCELLUL) P__743,SUM(a.PMS1SIGCONNESTABATT) P__51,SUM(a.PMSCHEDACTIVITYCELLUL) P__931 ,k.AZIMUTH par0, k.BEAMWIDTH par1, k.ENODEB_CN par2, a.EUTRANCELLFDD par3, k.CELL_TYPE par4, k.CELL_BAND par5, k.CELL_EARFCN par6, k.CELL_OPERATOR par7, k.ENODEB_IBGE_ID par8, k.ID_MASTER par9, k.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY par10, k.NETWORK par11, k.SITE_OPERATOR par12, :1 par13, k.ENODEB_REGION par14, k.SETOR_FISICO par15, k.SHARING_MODE par16, k.SIGLA_LOGICA par17, k.SITE_TYPE par18, k.ERB_FISICA par19, k.STATION_CODE par20, k.CELL_TAC par21, k.ENODEB_UF par22, k.SITE_VENDOR par23, k.SITE_VERSION par24, :2 par25, a.MECONTEXT par26, k.ENODEB_IBGE_ID par27, k.ENODEB_LATITUDE par28, k.ENODEB_LONGITUDE par29, k.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD par30 from DBN0_ERI_RAN.LTE_EUTRANCELLFDD_0 a, DBN0_EXT_ENRICH.ENR_RADIO_4G_CELLS k where a.EUTRANCELLFDD = k.CELL_NAME AND a.MECONTEXT = k.MOBILE_SITE_NAME AND a.MEASSTARTTIME>=to_date(:3 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND a.MEASSTARTTIME<to_date(:4 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND k.STARTTIME>=to_date(:5 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') AND k.STARTTIME<to_date(:6 ,'YYYYMMDDHH24MI') group by k.ENODEB_CN, k.ENODEB_MUNICIPALY, k.ENODEB_REGION, k.ENODEB_UF, k.ERB_FISICA, a.EUTRANCELLFDD, k.ID_MASTER, a.MECONTEXT, k.SETOR_FISICO, k.SIGLA_LOGICA, k.SITE_OPERATOR, k.SITE_VENDOR, k.STATION_CODE, k.AZIMUTH, k.BEAMWIDTH, k.CELL_BAND, k.CELL_EARFCN, k.CELL_OPERATOR, k.CELL_TAC, k.CELL_TYPE, k.ENODEB_IBGE_ID, k.ENODEB_LATITUDE, k.ENODEB_LONGITUDE, k.ENODEB_NEIGHBORHOOD, k.NETWORK, k.SHARING_MODE, k.SITE_TYPE, k.SITE_VERSION) inner_select group by inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par18, inner_select.par19, inner_select.par20, inner_select.par21, inner_select.par22, inner_select.par23, inner_select.par24, inner_select.par25, inner_select.par26, inner_select.par27, inner_select.par28, inner_select.par29, inner_select.par30 order by inner_select.par2, inner_select.par3, inner_select.par9, inner_select.par10, inner_select.par12, inner_select.par13, inner_select.par14, inner_select.par15, inner_select.par17, inner_select.par19, inner_select.par20, inner_select.par22, inner_select.par23, inner_select.par25, inner_select.par26, inner_select.par0, inner_select.par1, inner_select.par4, inner_select.par5, inner_select.par6, inner_select.par7, inner_select.par8, inner_select.par11, inner_select.par16, inner_select.par18, inner_select.par21, inner_select.par24, inner_select.par27, inner_select.par28, inner_select.par29, inner_select.par30

stat.name: Total Number of Rowsets
stat.desc: Total number of rowsets received from underlying input

stat.name: Rowsets Leveraging Storage Aggregation
stat.desc: Number of rowsets leveraging storage aggregation pushdown

stat.name: Slow metadata bytes
stat.desc: Size of slow metadata in bytes

stat.name: SI saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by storage index

stat.name: Flash cache bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes fetched from flash cache

stat.name: Partial flash cache and disk bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes where IO was partially fetched from flash cache and disk

stat.name: Columnar cache saved bytes
stat.desc: Total bytes saved by columnar cache

stat.name: Dynamic Scan Tasks on Thread
stat.desc: Number of dynamic scan tasks completed by thread
